# Schemas And Static Artifacts

OpenWiki repository records are validated with JSON Schema 2020-12. The schema
files below are the public contract for Git-backed records, API payloads where
referenced, and static export machine artifacts.

## Repository And API Schemas

| Schema | `$id` | Required fields | Top-level properties |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/answer.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/answer.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/answer.schema.json` | `question`, `answer`, `citations`, `evidence`, `search` | `question`, `answer`, `citations`, `evidence`, `search` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/claim.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/claim.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/claim.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `text`, `page_id`, `source_ids`, `confidence`, `risk`, `status` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `text`, `page_id`, `source_ids`, `confidence`, `risk`, `last_verified_at`, `status` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/decision.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/decision.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/decision.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `proposal_id`, `decision`, `actor_id`, `rationale`, `decided_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `proposal_id`, `decision`, `actor_id`, `rationale`, `commit`, `decided_at`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/event.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/event.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/event.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `workspace_id`, `occurred_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `workspace_id`, `actor_id`, `operation`, `record_id`, `record_type`, `occurred_at`, `data`, `subject_ids`, `subject_paths`, `sensitivity`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/fact.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/fact.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/fact.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `kind`, `text`, `subject_ids`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `confidence`, `sensitivity`, `status`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `kind`, `text`, `subject_ids`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `confidence`, `sensitivity`, `status`, `valid_from`, `valid_to`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/inbox-item.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/inbox-item.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/inbox-item.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `inbox_kind`, `provider`, `status`, `received_at`, `updated_at`, `idempotency_key`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `inbox_kind`, `provider`, `adapter`, `status`, `owner_actor_id`, `submitted_by`, `target_space_id`, `target_path`, `external_id`, `origin`, `source_url`, `received_at`, `updated_at`, `idempotency_key`, `content_hash`, `payload`, `source_ids`, `proposal_ids`, `page_ids`, `event_ids`, `run_ids`, `git_commits`, `sensitivity`, `processing`, `metadata`, `validation_report`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/openwiki.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/openwiki.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/openwiki.schema.json` | `protocol_version`, `workspace_id`, `title`, `repo_format`, `created_at` | `protocol_version`, `workspace_id`, `title`, `default_language`, `repo_format`, `runtime`, `auth`, `search`, `created_at` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/page.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/page.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/page.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `page_type`, `title`, `body_format`, `body`, `path`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `status`, `topics`, `created_at`, `updated_at` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `page_type`, `title`, `summary`, `body_format`, `body`, `path`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `status`, `topics`, `created_at`, `updated_at` |

| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/proposal.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/proposal.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/proposal.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `status`, `actor_id`, `target_ids`, `diff`, `created_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `status`, `actor_id`, `target_ids`, `target_path`, `base_commit`, `diff`, `snapshot_path`, `snapshot_paths`, `validation_report_path`, `rationale`, `created_at`, `applied_at`, `applied_commit`, `closed_at`, `closed_by`, `close_resolution`, `close_rationale`, `superseded_by`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/run.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/run.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/run.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `run_type`, `status`, `actor_id`, `workspace_id`, `created_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `run_type`, `status`, `actor_id`, `workspace_id`, `created_at`, `started_at`, `completed_at`, `input`, `output`, `error`, `subject_ids`, `subject_paths`, `sensitivity`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/search.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/search.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/search.schema.json` | `results`, `count`, `total`, `truncated`, `persona` | `serving_layer`, `results`, `count`, `total`, `total_relation`, `truncated`, `persona`, `next_cursor`, `facets`, `facets_relation`, `explain` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/source.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/source.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/source.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `source_type`, `retrieved_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `title`, `source_type`, `url`, `retrieved_at`, `content_hash`, `storage`, `trust`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/take.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/take.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/take.schema.json` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `statement`, `rationale`, `probability`, `confidence`, `status`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `path` | `id`, `uri`, `type`, `statement`, `rationale`, `probability`, `confidence`, `status`, `due_at`, `resolved_at`, `resolution`, `score`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `created_at`, `updated_at`, `path` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/think.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/think.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/think.schema.json` | `question`, `answer`, `citations`, `evidence`, `search`, `gaps`, `diagnostics` | `question`, `answer`, `citations`, `evidence`, `search`, `gaps`, `diagnostics` |
| [`schemas/openwiki/v0/validation-report.schema.json`](https://github.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/blob/master/schemas/openwiki/v0/validation-report.schema.json) | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/joe-broadhead/open-wiki/v0.0.0/schemas/openwiki/v0/validation-report.schema.json` | `id`, `proposal_id`, `status`, `checked_at`, `issues` | `id`, `proposal_id`, `status`, `checked_at`, `issues` |

## Static Export Artifacts

Static export keeps human pages and machine-readable artifacts together. Public
exports include only records visible to public readers.

| Artifact | Contract |
| --- | --- |
| `index.html` | Server-rendered static home page when HTML export is enabled. |
| `pages.json`, `pages.jsonl` | Public page records. JSONL is the streaming-friendly machine artifact. |
| `sources.json`, `sources.jsonl` | Public source manifest records. Raw private connector credentials are never included. |
| `claims.json`, `claims.jsonl` | Public claim records. |
| `proposals.json`, `proposals.jsonl` | Public proposal records and proposal metadata visible to public readers. |
| `proposal-comments.json`, `proposal-comments.jsonl` | Public proposal comments. |
| `decisions.json`, `decisions.jsonl` | Public proposal decision records. |
| `events.json`, `events.jsonl` | Public audit events after visibility filtering. |
| `runs.json` | Recent public run metadata for static inspection. |
| `search-index.json` | Static search corpus for public client-side search. |
| `graph.json` | Public graph nodes and edges. |
| `graph-report.json` | Public deterministic graph analysis with hubs, components, gaps, stale hubs, and suggested questions. |
| `graph-report.html` | Human graph report page when full HTML export is enabled. |
| `agents/index.md` | Agent-oriented public graph entry point linking hubs, components, questions, and page Markdown. |
| `openapi.json` | OpenAPI 3.1 API contract emitted beside the static site. |
| `mcp-manifest.json` | MCP discovery manifest emitted beside the static site. |
| `llms.txt`, `llms-full.txt` | LLM-readable public page summaries and bounded full text. |
| `sitemap.xml`, `sitemap-*.xml`, `sitemap-index.xml` | Search-engine sitemap artifacts. |
| `static-export-report.json` | Export mode, page ceiling, sitemap shards, truncation, and warning metadata. |
| `pages/<slug>.html`, `pages/<slug>.md`, `pages/<slug>.json` | Per-page human and machine artifacts. |
| `records/<id>.html`, `records/<id>.json` | Per-source, claim, proposal, and decision artifacts. |
